diff_text:
--- a/tasks.py
+++ b/tasks.py
@@ -6,6 +6,6 @@
 @app.task
 def send_email(user_id, template):
     user = User.objects.get(id=user_id)
-    body = Template(template).render(user=user)
+    body = template.format(user=user)
     mailer.send(user.email, body)

gold_annotations.issue: str.format() with user-controlled template allows attribute access: {user.__class__.__bases__[0]...}
No error handling if user_id not found — DoesNotExist crashes the task.
